title: stenostephanus racemosus
intro: Stenostephanus racemosus, also known as the Bajuri bunga, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stenostephanus racemosus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, and can also be dried and used as a powder for various herbal preparations.
